name: Standard QA Test Case
description: Industry-standard test case format with all essential fields for comprehensive testing

fields.name: testCaseId
fields.label: Test Case ID
fields.helpText: Unique identifier for this test case

fields.name: title
fields.label: Test Case Title
fields.placeholder: Verify user login with valid credentials
fields.helpText: Brief, descriptive title of what is being tested

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.placeholder: Detailed description of what this test case validates

fields.name: preconditions
fields.label: Pre-conditions
fields.placeholder: User is logged out, browser cookies cleared, test data available
fields.helpText: Prerequisites that must be met before test execution

fields.name: steps
fields.label: Test Steps
fields.placeholder:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click login button
fields.helpText: Step-by-step instructions to execute the test

fields.name: expectedResult
fields.label: Expected Result
fields.placeholder: User is redirected to dashboard with success message displayed
fields.helpText: What should happen when test steps are executed correctly

fields.name: type
fields.label: Test Type
fields.helpText: Type of testing this case covers

fields.name: testData
fields.label: Test Data
fields.placeholder: Email: test@example.com, Password: Test123!

name: Agile User Story Test Case
description: Test cases aligned with user stories and acceptance criteria for Agile/Scrum teams

fields.name: userStoryId
fields.label: User Story ID
fields.helpText: Reference to the user story being tested

fields.name: userStory
fields.label: User Story
fields.placeholder: As a user, I want to reset my password so that I can regain access to my account
fields.helpText: User story in format: As a [role], I want [feature] so that [benefit]

fields.name: scenario
fields.label: Test Scenario
fields.placeholder: Verify password reset with valid email

fields.name: acceptanceCriteria
fields.label: Acceptance Criteria
fields.placeholder:
Given the user is on the forgot password page
When they enter a valid email
Then they receive a password reset link

fields.name: testSteps
fields.label: Test Steps
fields.placeholder:
1. Navigate to forgot password page
2. Enter valid email
3. Click submit

fields.name: expectedOutcome
fields.label: Expected Outcome
fields.placeholder: Success message displayed, reset email sent to user

fields.name: sprint
fields.label: Sprint
fields.placeholder: Sprint 5

name: Bug Verification Test Case
description: Template for verifying bug fixes and regression testing

fields.name: bugId
fields.label: Bug ID
fields.helpText: Reference to the bug tracking ticket

fields.name: bugTitle
fields.label: Bug Title
fields.placeholder: User cannot submit form with special characters

fields.name: bugDescription
fields.label: Bug Description
fields.placeholder: When user enters special characters in name field, form submission fails

fields.name: stepsToReproduce
fields.label: Steps to Reproduce
fields.placeholder:
1. Go to registration form
2. Enter name with special chars (!@#)
3. Click submit
fields.helpText: Original steps that reproduced the bug

fields.name: verificationSteps
fields.label: Verification Steps
fields.placeholder:
1. Repeat steps to reproduce
2. Verify form submits successfully
3. Check data is saved correctly
fields.helpText: Steps to verify the fix works

fields.name: expectedBehavior
fields.label: Expected Behavior After Fix
fields.placeholder: Form accepts special characters and submits successfully

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.placeholder: Chrome 120, Windows 11

name: API Testing Template
description: Template for API endpoint testing with requests and responses

fields.name: testCaseId
fields.label: Test Case ID
fields.placeholder: API-TC-001

fields.name: endpoint
fields.label: API Endpoint
fields.placeholder: /api/users/login

fields.name: description
fields.label: Test Description
fields.placeholder: Verify user login with valid credentials returns JWT token

fields.name: requestHeaders
fields.label: Request Headers
fields.placeholder:
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer <token>
fields.helpText: HTTP headers to send with request

fields.name: requestBody
fields.label: Request Body

fields.name: expectedResponse
fields.label: Expected Response

name: Minimal Template
description: Bare minimum fields for quick test case creation

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.placeholder: Verify login functionality

fields.name: steps
fields.label: Steps
fields.placeholder:
1. Open login page
2. Enter credentials
3. Click login

fields.name: expectedResult
fields.label: Expected Result
fields.placeholder: User successfully logs in and sees dashboard
